## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `chore` — build config, tooling, project setup
- [ ] `feat` — new feature or functionality
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructure without behaviour change
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
